name: grasp (ngit-grasp)
label: grasp
description: Self-hosted git-over-nostr backend: git host + embedded relay (GRASP)

requiredConfig.name: grasp domain
requiredConfig.description: public domain for your grasp server; serves both git clone/push and the nostr relay (e.g. git.example.com)

requiredConfig.name: relay name
requiredConfig.description: display name shown in the relay's nip-11 info. defaults to your domain.

requiredConfig.name: relay description
requiredConfig.description: short description shown in the relay's nip-11 info.

requiredConfig.name: bootstrap sync relay
requiredConfig.description: optional wss relay to seed repo discovery; more relays are found automatically (e.g. wss://relay.damus.io)

requiredConfig.name: accept contributor prs
requiredConfig.description: enable grasp-06 so anyone can push pr branches without pre-authorisation.

requiredConfig.name: repository whitelist
requiredConfig.description: comma-separated npub, npub/identifier, or identifier. empty = accept any repo that lists this server.

requiredConfig.name: blocked authors
requiredConfig.description: comma-separated npubs whose events are always rejected.
